_README: Exchange trading-calendar exceptions, keyed by the exchange codes in lib/sessions.js (SEHK/KRX/TWSE/TSE/EURONEXT/XETRA/LSE/US). Per exchange: 'closed' = full-day closures, 'half' = early-close (half) sessions. Hand-maintained like calendar.json — top up each year. Dates are the exchange's LOCAL calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). marketState() returns 'holiday' on a 'closed' date; the Pre-Read adds a 'HALF DAY' heads-up when a region's exchange is on a 'half' date. SAFE-DEGRADING: a MISSING date just falls back to normal behavior; only a WRONG date mislabels a real session, so verify before adding. The exact early-close TIME is not modeled (the Pre-Read fires pre-open, so it only needs the heads-up). Seeded 2026-07-15 for the remainder of 2026, verified against exchange/aggregator calendars; lunar-based dates (Chuseok, Mid-Autumn) especially warrant a re-check each year.
